title: 327 (disambiguation)
content:
{{Easteregg}}
[[File:Doctor_Aphra_10_Star_Wars_40th.png|thumb|right|250px|Darth Vader stands in Docking Bay 327 aboard the first Death Star.]]
There were many uses of the number '''327'''. Below is a list of them.

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[327-T]]''', a [[WED-15 Treadwell droid]] who served aboard the [[Venator-class Star Destroyer|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Tranquility]]''
*'''[[327th Star Corps]]''', a legion of clone troopers.
*[[Corridor 327E-6|'''Corridor 327E-6''']], a location on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station|Death Star]]
*'''[[CORT-327]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|rebel]] [[freighter]]
*'''[[CT-327]]''', the [[deck officer]] at [[Rishi Station]]
*'''[[Docking Bay 327]]''', the Death Star docking bay the ''[[Millennium Falcon]]'' was docked inside
**The associated '''[[Control Room 327]]'''
*'''[[HURID-327]]''', a droid on [[Takodana]]
*'''[[J-type 327 Nubian royal starship]], a starship model from [[Naboo]].
*'''[[KRONOS-327]]''', an [[IG-86 sentinel droid]] working for [[Ziro Desilijic Tiure]]
*The [[New Republic]] had a total of 327 senators in [[5 ABY]].
*'''[[Platform 327]]''', the landing platform on [[Cloud City]] used by the ''Millennium Falcon''
*'''Triple-9, 327''', a classified [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] work order code
*'''[[Vulptereen 327]]''', a model of [[podracer]]
*The '''[[Sandy Dunes Inn]]''' within the [[Hunters of the Outer Rim]] [[Mos Espa Podrace]] battlefield on [[Vespaara]] has 327 displayed on their street sign

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Individuals===
*'''[[CT-327/Legends|CT-327]]''', the [[Deck officer/Legends|deck officer]] at [[Rishi Station/Legends|Rishi Station]]
*'''[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]''', who was called by this [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] serial number when using the alias "Lucky"

===Droids===
*'''[[327-T/Legends|327-T]]''', a [[WED-15 Treadwell droid/Legends|WED-15 Treadwell droid]] serving aboard the [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Tranquility/Legends|''Tranquility'']]
*'''[[DFS-327]]''', a [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|vulture droid]] of the [[DFS Starfighter Squadron]] assigned to the [[Saak'ak/Legends|''Saak'ak'']]
*'''[[KRONOS-327/Legends|KRONOS-327]]''', an [[IG-86 sentinel droid/Legends|IG-86 sentinel droid]] belonging to [[Ziro Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Ziro]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]

===Groups===
*'''[[327th Star Corps/Legends|327th Star Corps]]''', a legion of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]]

===Locations===
*'''[[Bay 327 (Byss)|Bay 327]]''' on [[Port Tower Tarkin-12]]
*'''[[Docking Bay 327/Legends|Docking Bay 327]]''', the location that the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] docked with the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]], and its [[Docking Control Room 327|control room]]
*'''[[Outpost 327]]''', a station from where [[Tydirium/Legends|''Tydirium'']] was captured
*'''[[Platform 327/Legends|Platform 327]]''', the landing platform on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] where the ''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]'' landed

===Vehicles===
*'''[[327 (corvette group)|327]]''', a fleet of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]]
*'''[[327-A]]''', '''[[327-B|B]]''' and '''[[327-C|C]]''', a trio of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] CR90 corvettes
*'''[[J-type 327 Nubian royal starship/Legends|J-type 327 Nubian royal starship]]''', a royal starship model fitted with a '''[[327 core|327 hyperdrive core]]'''
*'''[[Rian-327 airspeeder]]''', a type of personal airspeeder found on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]
*'''[[Vulptereen 327/Legends|Vulptereen 327]]''', a podracer model created by the [[Vulptereen/Legends|Vulptereen]]

}}
